properties.name: content
properties.value:
Welcome to Hyprverse Campus!

  Cauvery Hostel (north)  — Rooms 4, 5, 6
  Stage (NE)              — presentations & broadcast
  Plaza (center)          — open collaboration
  Cafe (SW)               — social lounge
  Coworking (SE)          — open desk pods
  Mandakini Hostel (south)— Rooms 1, 2, 3
  Game Arcade (south)     — Snake, Flappy
                            + Tic-Tac-Toe & Connect 4

Tip: head south past coworking for
the Game Arcade — or portal across the park!
